name: QMD Recall
description: Deterministic before-prompt QMD retrieval for OpenClaw. No embedded LLM subagent, hard timeout, fail closed.
security-notes: Runs a configured QMD command with child_process.spawn and a hard timeout. Installers should review qmdCommand and collections before enabling.
privacy-notes: Injects private snippets into hidden prompt context only. Does not log snippets unless logSnippets is explicitly true. Defaults to direct-message-only.
attack-surface-reduction: Fail-closed retrieval path, no embedded LLM subagent, no network calls except whatever the configured qmd binary performs.
